metadata.title: Russian Post API — "Otpravka" Online Service
metadata.description: REST API for interacting with Russian Post's "Otpravka" (Shipping) service. Capabilities: shipping label generation, cost-calculated document preparation, electronic document submission to post offices (OPS), address, phone number, and recipient name (FIO) normalization. Requests and responses use JSON format.

app_token.description: Application authorization token. Sent to the registered email after API access activation. Can also be found in account settings at otpravka.pochta.ru.

user_key.description: User authorization key. Generated as: base64(login:password), where login and password are issued by passport.pochta.ru.

value.name: WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: With declared value and cash on delivery (COD)

value.name: WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_COMPULSORY_PAYMENT
value.description: With declared value and compulsory payment

value.name: FROZEN
value.description: Batch is being accepted at post office, editing prohibited

value.name: SENT
value.description: Tracking data exists for orders in this batch

value.name: GIVING_COMMON
value.description: Foreign item delivery (op code and attr = 0)

value.name: GIVING_RECIPIENT_IN_PO
value.description: Delivered to addressee via parcel locker

value.name: GIVING_SENDER_IN_PO
value.description: Delivered to sender via parcel locker

value.name: GIVING_RECIPIENT_CONTROL
value.description: Delivered to addressee with return receipt

value.name: GIVING_RECIPIENT_CONTROL_POSTMAN
value.description: Delivered to addressee with return receipt by postman

value.name: GIVING_RECIPIENT_CONTROL_COURIER
value.description: Delivered to addressee with return receipt by courier

value.name: RETURNING_BY_RECEPIENT_ABSENCE
value.description: Return: addressee absent at specified address

value.name: RETURNING_BY_UNKNOWN_RECEPIENT
value.description: Return: PO Box addressee not specified or incorrect

value.name: DELIVERING_TO_NEW_ADDRESS
value.description: Forwarding: addressee moved to new address

value.name: UNDELIVERED
value.description: Delivery not available at specified address

value.name: FAILED_BY_DELAYING_REQUEST
value.description: Failed delivery: postponed by addressee request

value.name: WAITING_RECEPIENT_IN_OFFICE
value.description: Addressee will pick up at post office

value.name: PASSED_WITH_CUSTOM_TAX
value.description: Sent with mandatory customs duty payment

value.name: CUSTOM_STORING_PROLONGED_3
value.description: Customs hold: non-compliant/missing certificate of origin

value.name: CUSTOM_STORING_PROLONGED_5
value.description: Customs hold: unable to contact client

value.name: CUSTOM_STORING_PROLONGED_7
value.description: Customs hold: transferred to customs authority

value.name: CUSTOM_STORING_PROLONGED_8
value.description: Customs hold: export restrictions — non-compliant/missing license

value.name: REGISTRATION_PASSAGE_IN_MMPO
value.description: Transit registered at MMPO (international mail processing center)

value.name: PAYMENT_AMOUNT_WITHHELD
value.description: Payment amount withheld by designated operator (DO)

value.name: PAYMENT_AMOUNT_DEBITED
value.description: Payment amount debited by Federal Customs Service (FCS)

value.name: PAYMENT_AMOUNT_FOR_WITHHELD
value.description: Payment amount pending withholding by DO

value.name: ADDRESSEE_REQUEST_OWN_PICK_UP
value.description: Addressee will pick up at office

value.name: SECOND_ATTEMPT_PROHIBITED_ARTICLES
value.description: 2nd attempt: prohibited contents — item not delivered

value.name: LATER_24_HOURS_BEFORE_COMPLETION
value.description: Request submitted later than 24h before storage expiry

value.name: WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_COMPULSORY_PAYMENT
value.description: With declared value and compulsory payment

value.name: COMBINED_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: Combined with declared value and COD

enum.name: NoticeCategory
enum.description: Delivery notification category for registered postal items

enum.name: PostmarkCode
enum.description: Postmark codes for domestic and international items

value.name: PAPER
value.description: A5 (14.8 x 21 cm), laser and inkjet printing

value.name: NOT_VALIDATED_HAS_NO_KLADR_RECORD
value.description: Review needed: not found in KLADR (address directory)

value.name: NOT_VALIDATED_HOUSE_WITHOUT_STREET_OR_NP
value.description: Review needed: house without street or settlement

value.name: NOT_VALIDATED_HOUSE_EXTENSION_WITHOUT_HOUSE
value.description: Review needed: building extension without house number

value.name: NOT_VALIDATED_EXCEDED_HOUSE_NUMBER
value.description: Review needed: house number too large

value.name: NOT_VALIDATED_DICTIONARY
value.description: Review needed: not matched against directory

value.name: GOOD_EXTRA_PHONE
value.description: Record contains more than one phone number

value.name: REFUSED_BY_USER
value.description: User declined to submit courier pickup request

value.name: DONE
value.description: Goods release permitted without customs duties

value.name: FTS_ERROR
value.description: Failed to submit for customs declaration

enum.name: DimensionType
enum.description: Package size category (max dimensions in mm)

value.name: OVERSIZED
value.description: Oversized (sum of sides max 1200 mm, single side max 600 mm)

enum.name: DocumentDownloadStatus
enum.description: Document re-download status (indicates which documents have changed)

value.name: F103_AND_OPM
value.description: Form F103 and online payment mark labels changed

value.name: F103_AND_NEW_SHIPMENT
value.description: Form F103 changed and new shipments added

value.name: TRANSPORT_BLANK_AND_OPM
value.description: Transport waybill and online payment mark labels changed

value.name: TRANSPORT_BLANK_AND_NEW_SHIPMENT
value.description: Transport waybill changed and new shipments added

value.name: PARTIAL_REDEMPTION
value.description: With partial redemption (buyer keeps selected items)

value.name: IN_FINAL_STAGES_OF_EXECUTION
value.description: In final delivery stage (courier at destination)

value.name: PIN
value.description: PIN code (for parcel lockers and partner pickup points)

value.name: ORDER_NUM_AND_FIO
value.description: Order number + full name (for post office pickup)

enum.name: LineAttr
enum.description: Settlement item attribute (fiscal receipt line type)

value.description: With declared value and compulsory payment
Combined with declared value and COD

enum.name: PayAttr
enum.description: Settlement method attribute (fiscal receipt payment sign)

value.description: Full payment at time of item transfer
Partial payment at transfer with subsequent credit payment
Transfer without payment with subsequent credit payment

value.name: LETTER_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: Letter with declared value and COD

value.name: BANDEROL_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: Banderol with declared value and COD

value.name: POSTAL_PARCEL_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: Parcel with declared value and COD

value.name: EMS_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: EMS with declared value and COD

value.name: EMS_OPTIMAL_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: EMS optimal with declared value and COD

value.name: ONLINE_PARCEL_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: Online parcel with declared value and COD

value.name: ONLINE_COURIER_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: Online courier with declared value and COD

value.name: BUSINESS_COURIER_ES_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE
value.description: Business courier express with declared value

value.name: PARCEL_CLASS_1_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: Parcel 1st class with declared value and COD

value.name: LETTER_CLASS_1_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: Letter 1st class with declared value and COD

value.name: BANDEROL_CLASS_1_WITH_DECLARED_VALUE_AND_CASH_ON_DELIVERY
value.description: Banderol 1st class with declared value and COD

value.name: GIVING_RECIPIENT_IN_PO
value.description: Delivered to addressee via parcel locker

value.name: GIVING_SENDER_IN_PO
value.description: Delivered to sender via parcel locker

value.name: GIVING_RECIPIENT_CONTROL
value.description: Delivered to addressee with return receipt

value.name: GIVING_RECIPIENT_CONTROL_POSTMAN
value.description: Delivered to addressee with return receipt by postman

value.name: GIVING_RECIPIENT_CONTROL_COURIER
value.description: Delivered to addressee with return receipt by courier

value.name: DELIVERING_TO_NEW_ADDRESS
value.description: Forwarding: addressee moved to new address

value.name: PASSED_WITH_CUSTOM_TAX
value.description: Sent with mandatory customs duty payment

model.name: OrderV1
model.description: Order (version 1.0) — object for creating/editing a shipment

field.name: num-address-type
field.description: Number for PO box, military unit, military unit YuYa, field post

field.name: good-id
field.description: Internal product identifier assigned by the supplier

field.name: service-type
field.description: Service type for product: 1 — without opening, 2 — with contents inspection, 3 — with fitting

field.name: payment-details
field.description: Cash on Delivery (COD) recipient bank details

field.name: is-cash
field.description: Flag indicating COD payment received in cash

field.name: num-address-type-to
field.description: Number for PO box, military unit, military unit YuYa, field post

field.name: recipient-name
field.description: Recipient name as a single string (Full Name (FIO) or organization name)

field.name: sender-comment
field.description: Sender comment for electronic delivery notice

field.name: sender-name
field.description: Sender name as a single string

field.name: shelf-life-days
field.description: Shipment storage period, from 15 to 60 days

field.name: tariff-count
field.description: Number of tariffs: 1 — full only, 2 — full and discounted

field.name: tariff-discount-rate
field.description: Total cost with discount, excluding VAT

field.name: tariff-discount-rate-with-vat
field.description: Total cost with discount, including VAT

field.name: tariff-full-rate
field.description: Total cost without discount, excluding VAT

field.name: tariff-full-rate-with-vat
field.description: Total cost without discount, including VAT

field.name: with-uzeuv-notice
field.description: With legally significant electronic delivery notice

model.name: OrderV2
model.description: Order (version 2.0) — request body is identical to OrderV1 (162 fields). Only the response format differs.
model.note: Request body is fully identical to OrderV1 (88 top-level fields, same nested objects: address-from, customs-declaration, dimension, ecom-data, fiscal-data, goods, payment-details). The only difference from v1 is the RESPONSE format: v2 returns an array orders[{barcode, order-num, result-id, group-name}] instead of {result-ids}.

field.name: num-address-type
field.description: Number for PO box, military unit, military unit YuYa, field post

field.name: good-id
field.description: Internal product identifier assigned by the supplier

field.name: service-type
field.description: Service type for product: 1 — without opening, 2 — with contents inspection, 3 — with fitting

field.name: num-address-type-to
field.description: Number for PO box, military unit, military unit YuYa, field post

field.name: recipient-name
field.description: Recipient name as a single string (Full Name (FIO) or organization name)

field.name: sender-comment
field.description: Sender comment for electronic delivery notice

field.name: sender-name
field.description: Sender name as a single string (Full Name (FIO) or organization name)

field.name: shelf-life-days
field.description: Shipment storage period, from 15 to 60 days

field.name: tender
field.description: Available only for ECOM Marketplace shipments — tender shipment

field.name: transport-mode
field.description: Possible transportation mode (for EMS Tender only)

field.name: with-uzeuv-notice
field.description: Mark: With legally significant electronic delivery notice

field.name: tariff-count
field.description: Number of tariffs: 1 — full tariff only, 2 — full and discounted tariffs

field.name: tariff-discount-rate
field.description: Total shipment cost with discount, excluding VAT

field.name: tariff-discount-rate-vat
field.description: VAT on total shipment cost with discount

field.name: tariff-discount-rate-with-vat
field.description: Total shipment cost with discount, including VAT

field.name: tariff-full-rate
field.description: Total shipment cost without discount, excluding VAT

field.name: tariff-full-rate-vat
field.description: VAT on total shipment cost without discount

field.name: tariff-full-rate-with-vat
field.description: Total shipment cost without discount, including VAT

field.name: with-discount
field.description: true — discounted tariff, false — standard tariff

field.name: payment-details
field.description: Cash on Delivery (COD) recipient bank details

field.name: is-cash
field.description: Flag indicating COD payment received in cash

model.name: OrderResponse
model.description: Full order object (response to search requests). Contains all OrderV1 request fields plus system fields (tariffs, statuses, sender address).

field.name: address-changed
field.description: Recipient address was corrected during address cleansing

field.name: avia-rate
field.description: Air surcharge excluding VAT (legacy compatibility, kopecks)

field.name: customs-declaration
field.description: Customs declaration (extended, with Federal Customs Service data)

field.name: customs-decision
field.description: Customs authority decision: REJECTION, RELEASE_WO_CUSTOMS_DUTY, CUSTOMS_DUTY_REQUIRED, CUSTOMS_CONTROL_REQUIRED, RESERVE, RELEASE_SUSPENDED, RELEASE_PERIOD_PROLONGED, RELEASE_CUSTOMS_DUTY_PAID, AUTO_RELEASE_RETURN_GOODS, RELEASE_RETURN_GOODS, REJECTION_AUTO_RELEASE, DEPARTURE_ALLOWED, DEPARTURE_DENIED

field.name: registration-date
field.description: Document registration date by customs authority

field.name: status
field.description: Declaration status: NEW, TRANSIT, IN_PROGRESS, DONE, REJECTED, CANCELED, ILLEGAL_DATA, FTS_ERROR

field.name: good-id
field.description: Internal product identifier assigned by the supplier

field.name: id
field.description: Item number in the contents list

field.name: service-type
field.description: Service type: 1 — without opening, 2 — with inspection, 3 — with fitting

field.name: ground-rate
field.description: Ground delivery charge excluding VAT (legacy compatibility, kopecks)

field.name: in-mmo
field.description: Shipment is part of a multi-piece shipment

field.name: insr-rate
field.description: Declared Value fee excluding VAT (legacy compatibility, kopecks)

field.name: mass-rate
field.description: Postal charge excluding VAT (legacy compatibility, kopecks)

field.name: num-address-type-from
field.description: Number for PO box, military unit (sender)

field.name: num-address-type-to
field.description: Number for PO box, military unit (recipient)

field.name: payment-details
field.description: Cash on Delivery (COD) recipient bank details

field.name: is-cash
field.description: Flag indicating COD payment received in cash

field.name: postmarks
field.description: Postmark codes for domestic and international shipments

field.name: recipient-name
field.description: Recipient name as a single string

field.name: sender-comment
field.description: Sender comment for electronic delivery notice

field.name: sender-name
field.description: Sender name as a single string

field.name: shelf-life-days
field.description: Shipment storage period, from 15 to 60 days

field.name: sms-notice-recipient-rate-with-vat
field.description: SMS package for recipient surcharge including VAT (kopecks)

field.name: sms-notice-recipient-rate-wo-vat
field.description: SMS package for recipient surcharge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: tender
field.description: Available only for ECOM Marketplace shipments — tender shipment

field.name: transport-mode
field.description: Possible transportation mode (for EMS Tender only)

field.name: vsd-rate-with-vat
field.description: Accompanying documents return surcharge including VAT (kopecks)

field.name: vsd-rate-wo-vat
field.description: Accompanying documents return surcharge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: with-fitting-rate-with-vat
field.description: Contents inspection with fitting surcharge including VAT (kopecks)

field.name: with-fitting-rate-wo-vat
field.description: Contents inspection with fitting surcharge excluding VAT (kopecks)

model.name: Batch
model.description: Batch — object containing a group of orders for dispatch

field.name: accepted-count
field.description: Number of shipments that arrived at the post office

field.name: combined-batch-mail-types
field.description: Shipment types in a combined batch

field.name: courier-call-rate-with-vat
field.description: Courier pickup service charge including VAT (kopecks)

field.name: courier-call-rate-wo-vat
field.description: Courier pickup service charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: delivery-count
field.description: Number of shipments delivered to the addressee

field.name: delivery-notice-payment-method
field.description: Payment method for RPI delivery notice

field.name: is-postoffice-ukd
field.description: Whether the acceptance point is a UKD

field.name: shipment-avia-rate-sum
field.description: Total air delivery charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-avia-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total air delivery charge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-completeness-checking-rate-sum
field.description: Total completeness checking charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-completeness-checking-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total completeness checking charge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-contents-checking-rate-sum
field.description: Total contents checking charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-contents-checking-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total contents checking charge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-count
field.description: Number of orders in the batch

field.name: shipment-functionality-checking-rate-sum
field.description: Total functionality checking charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-functionality-checking-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total functionality checking charge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-ground-rate-sum
field.description: Total ground delivery charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-ground-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total ground delivery charge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-insure-rate-sum
field.description: Total Declared Value charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-insure-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total Declared Value charge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-inventory-rate-sum
field.description: Total contents inventory charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-inventory-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total contents inventory charge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-mass-rate-sum
field.description: Total postal delivery charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-mass-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total postal delivery charge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-notice-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total delivery notice surcharge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-partial-redemption-rate-sum
field.description: Total partial redemption charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-partial-redemption-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total partial redemption charge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-pre-postal-preparation-rate-sum
field.description: Total pre-postal preparation charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-pre-postal-preparation-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total pre-postal preparation charge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-sms-notice-rate-sum
field.description: Total SMS notification charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-sms-notice-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total SMS notification charge (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-with-fitting-rate-sum
field.description: Total fitting service charge excluding VAT (kopecks)

field.name: shipment-with-fitting-rate-vat-sum
field.description: VAT on total fitting service charge (kopecks)

model.name: Session
model.description: User session for batch order processing

field.name: barcodes
field.description: Array of Tracking Numbers (barcodes) in the session

field.name: direct-barcode
field.description: Tracking Number of the direct (outbound) shipment

field.name: return-barcode
field.description: Tracking Number of the return shipment (in response)

field.name: nearest-postoffice
field.description: Nearest post office — structure is identical to the main object

status.name: CREATED
status.description: Batch created, orders can be edited

status.name: FROZEN
status.description: Batch is frozen (checkin submitted), editing is not allowed

status.name: ACCEPTED
status.description: Batch accepted at the Post Office (OPS)

status.name: CREATED
status.description: Session created, orders can be added

status.name: READY_TO_CLOSE
status.description: Session is ready to be closed

status.name: CLOSED
status.description: Session closed, batches have been formed

type.name: ADD_BACKLOGS_TO_BATCH
type.description: Add orders to an existing batch

group.name: Authorization
group.note: The Russian Post API does not have a separate authorization endpoint. Authorization is performed via two HTTP headers sent with every request: 1. Authorization: AccessToken {token} — application token 2. X-User-Authorization: Basic {base64(login:password)} — user credentials Both headers are required simultaneously.

group.name: Orders
group.description: Creating, editing, searching, and deleting orders

endpoint.name: Create order v2
endpoint.request: Array of OrderV1 objects (request body is identical to v1)

endpoint.name: Search order by query
endpoint.request: Query parameter: query — search string (Tracking Number, order number, etc.)

responses.response: Array of OrderResponse objects (full version: includes sender address *-from, customs-declaration, fiscal-data, goods)
OrderResponse object (full version: includes sender address *-from, customs-declaration, fiscal-data, goods)
Array of OrderResponse objects (lightweight version: without sender address *-from, without customs-declaration, fiscal-data, goods)

endpoint.name: Return orders to New status
endpoint.request: Array of order identifiers [long]. Batch must be in CREATED status.

group.name: Batches
group.description: Creating and managing batches and orders within batches

endpoint.name: Create batch from N orders
endpoint.request: Body: array of order identifiers [long]. Query: sending-date, timezone-offset, use-online-balance.

endpoint.name: Add orders to batch
endpoint.request: Array of OrderV1 objects (same as when creating an order)

endpoint.name: Move orders to batch
endpoint.request: Body: array of identifiers [long]. Query: group-name (optional).

json_examples.example: { "batch-name": "20240315-001", "batch-status": "CREATED", "batch-status-date": "2024-03-15T10:00:00.000+03:00", "combined-batch-mail-types": [], "courier-call-rate-with-vat": 0, "courier-call-rate-wo-vat": 0, "completeness-checking-rate-with-vat": 0, "completeness-checking-rate-wo-vat": 0, "contents-checking-rate-with-vat": 0, "contents-checking-rate-wo-vat": 0, "delivery-notice-rate-with-vat": 0, "delivery-notice-rate-wo-vat": 0, "fragile-rate-with-vat": 0, "fragile-rate-wo-vat": 0, "ground-rate-with-vat": 15000, "ground-rate-wo-vat": 12500, "insurance-rate-with-vat": 0, "insurance-rate-wo-vat": 0, "inventory-rate-with-vat": 0, "inventory-rate-wo-vat": 0, "list-number": 1, "list-number-date": "2024-03-15", "mail-category": "ORDERED", "mail-category-text": "Заказное", "mail-rank": "WO_RANK", "mail-type": "POSTAL_PARCEL", "mail-type-text": "Посылка", "mass-rate": 5000, "mass-rate-with-vat": 6000, "mass-rate-wo-vat": 5000, "notice-rate-with-vat": 0, "notice-rate-wo-vat": 0, "oversize-rate-with-vat": 0, "oversize-rate-wo-vat": 0, "payment-method": "CASHLESS", "postoffice-address": "г. Москва, ул. Мясницкая, д. 26", "postoffice-code": "101000", "postoffice-name": "ОПС Москва 101000", "sending-date": "2024-03-16", "shipment-avia-rate-sum": 0, "shipment-avia-rate-vat-sum": 0, "shipment-completeness-checking-rate-sum": 0, "shipment-completeness-checking-rate-vat-sum": 0, "shipment-contents-checking-rate-sum": 0, "shipment-contents-checking-rate-vat-sum": 0, "shipment-count": 3, "shipment-fragile-rate-sum": 0, "shipment-fragile-rate-vat-sum": 0, "shipment-ground-rate-sum": 15000, "shipment-ground-rate-vat-sum": 2500, "shipment-insurance-rate-sum": 0, "shipment-insurance-rate-vat-sum": 0, "shipment-inventory-rate-sum": 0, "shipment-inventory-rate-vat-sum": 0, "shipment-mass-rate-sum": 5000, "shipment-mass-rate-vat-sum": 1000, "shipment-notice-rate-sum": 0, "shipment-notice-rate-vat-sum": 0, "shipment-oversize-rate-sum": 0, "shipment-oversize-rate-vat-sum": 0, "shipment-sms-notice-rate-sum": 0, "shipment-sms-notice-rate-vat-sum": 0, "shipment-total-rate-sum": 20000, "shipment-total-vat-sum": 3500, "shipment-vsd-rate-sum": 0, "shipment-vsd-rate-vat-sum": 0, "shipping-notice-type": "SIMPLE", "transport-type": "SURFACE", "use-online-balance": false, "wo-mail-rank": true }

endpoint.name: Search order in batch by ID

responses.response: OrderResponse object (full version: includes sender address *-from, customs-declaration, fiscal-data, goods)

endpoint.name: Search orders by group in batch

responses.response: Array of OrderResponse objects (lightweight version: without sender address *-from, without customs-declaration, fiscal-data, goods)

endpoint.name: Search orders with Tracking Number
endpoint.request: Query parameter: query — search string (Tracking Number, order number)

responses.response: Array of OrderResponse objects (full version: includes sender address *-from, customs-declaration, fiscal-data, goods)

endpoint.name: Search all batches
endpoint.request: Query parameters: mailType, mailCategory, size (default 10), sort (default batch-status-date), page (default 0)

endpoint.name: Change sending date
endpoint.request: Path parameters: name — batch name, year/month/dayOfMonth — new date

endpoint.name: Retrieve order data in batch
endpoint.request: Path parameter: name. Query: size (default 10), sort, page (default 0).

responses.response: Array of OrderResponse objects (full version: includes sender address *-from, customs-declaration, fiscal-data, goods)

group.name: Documents
group.description: Generating print forms, Form F103, Form F7p, Form F112EK documents, etc.

endpoint.name: Generate order print forms
endpoint.request: Path parameter: id — order identifier. Query: sending-date, print-type (optional).

json_examples.example: Ответ возвращается в виде PDF-файла (binary). Content-Type: application/pdf.

endpoint.name: Generate forms before batch creation
endpoint.request: Path parameter: id — order identifier. Query: sending-date.

json_examples.example: Ответ возвращается в виде PDF-файла (binary). Content-Type: application/pdf.

endpoint.name: Generate documentation package
endpoint.request: Path parameter: name — batch name. Query: print-type, print-type-form.

json_examples.example: Ответ возвращается в виде ZIP-архива (binary). Content-Type: application/zip. Содержит: ярлыки, Ф103, Ф7п и другие формы.
Ответ возвращается в виде PDF-файла (binary). Content-Type: application/pdf.

endpoint.name: Generate Form F7p
endpoint.request: Path parameter: id — order identifier. Query: sending-date, print-type.

json_examples.example: Ответ возвращается в виде PDF-файла (binary). Content-Type: application/pdf.

endpoint.name: Generate Form F112EK
endpoint.request: Path parameter: id — order identifier. Query: sending-date. Only for orders with Cash on Delivery (COD).

json_examples.example: Ответ возвращается в виде PDF-файла (binary). Content-Type: application/pdf. Генерируется только для заказов с наложенным платежом (payment > 0).

responses.response: PDF document of the contents inspection report

json_examples.example: Ответ возвращается в виде PDF-файла (binary). Content-Type: application/pdf.

endpoint.name: Generate Easy Return label
endpoint.request: Path parameter: barcode — Tracking Number of the shipment. Query: print-type.

responses.response: PDF document of the return label

json_examples.example: Ответ возвращается в виде PDF-файла (binary). Content-Type: application/pdf.

group.name: Sessions
group.description: Batch processing of orders via sessions

endpoint.name: Close session
endpoint.request: Path parameter: sessionUuid. Query: sending-date, timezone-offset, use-online-balance.

json_examples.example: HTTP 200 OK — пустое тело ответа при успешном закрытии сессии.

responses.response: SESSION_IN_PROGRESS — session is currently being processed

json_examples.example: HTTP 200 OK — пустое тело ответа при успешном удалении заказов из сессии.

endpoint.name: Retrieve session errors
endpoint.request: Path parameter: sessionUuid. Query: size, page.

endpoint.name: Create return for a direct shipment

json_examples.example: [ { "address-from": "г. Москва, ул. Тверская, д. 1", "address-to": "г. Казань, ул. Баумана, д. 10", "insr-value": 50000, "mail-type": "POSTAL_PARCEL", "order-num": "RET-001", "postoffice-code": "101000", "recipient-name": "Иванов И.И.", "sender-name": "ООО Магазин" } ]

endpoint.name: Edit return
endpoint.request: Object: {address-from, address-to, insr-value, order-num, postoffice-code, recipient-name, sender-name}

json_examples.example: { "address-from": "г. Москва, ул. Тверская, д. 1", "address-to": "г. Казань, ул. Баумана, д. 15", "insr-value": 60000, "order-num": "RET-001", "postoffice-code": "101000", "recipient-name": "Иванов И.И.", "sender-name": "ООО Магазин" }

endpoint.name: Delete return
endpoint.request: Query parameter: barcode — Tracking Number of the return shipment

group.name: Post Offices
group.description: Searching and retrieving information about Post Offices (OPS)

endpoint.name: Search by postal code
endpoint.request: Path parameter: postal-code. Query: latitude, longitude, current-date-time, filter-by-office-type, ufps-postal-code.

json_examples.example: { "postal-code": "101000", "address": { "address-type": "DEFAULT", "index": "101000", "place": "Москва", "region": "Москва", "street": "Мясницкая", "house": "26" }, "address-source": "ФИАС", "current-day-working-hours": { "begin": "08:00", "end": "20:00", "lunches": [{"begin": "13:00", "end": "14:00"}] }, "distance": 0, "ecom": true, "is-closed": false, "is-private-category": false, "is-temporary-closed": false, "latitude": 55.761168, "longitude": 37.632684, "office-type": "ОПС", "phones": ["+7 (495) 123-45-67"], "settlement": "Москва", "type-code": "ГОПС", "ufps-postal-code": "101000", "working-hours": [ {"weekday": "Понедельник", "begin": "08:00", "end": "20:00", "lunches": [{"begin": "13:00", "end": "14:00"}]}, {"weekday": "Вторник", "begin": "08:00", "end": "20:00", "lunches": [{"begin": "13:00", "end": "14:00"}]}, {"weekday": "Среда", "begin": "08:00", "end": "20:00", "lunches": [{"begin": "13:00", "end": "14:00"}]}, {"weekday": "Четверг", "begin": "08:00", "end": "20:00", "lunches": [{"begin": "13:00", "end": "14:00"}]}, {"weekday": "Пятница", "begin": "08:00", "end": "20:00", "lunches": [{"begin": "13:00", "end": "14:00"}]}, {"weekday": "Суббота", "begin": "09:00", "end": "18:00", "lunches": []}, {"weekday": "Воскресенье", "begin": null, "end": null, "lunches": []} ] }

endpoint.name: Search by coordinates
endpoint.request: Query: latitude, longitude, top, filter, search-radius, current-date-time, hide-private, filter-by-office-type, yandex-address, geo-object.

endpoint.name: Detailed search by coordinates
endpoint.request: Query: latitude, longitude, top, offset, filter (ROUND_THE_CLOCK, WORK_ON_SUNDAY, RPO_CENTER, BIG_PARCELS, EMS, FORSAGE, WESTERN_UNION), search-radius, current-date-time, hide-private, hide-temporary-closed, full-address-only, hide-not-available.

responses.response: Array of PostOffice objects with detailed information

endpoint.name: Search by address
endpoint.request: Query: address — address string, top — number of results.

endpoint.name: Postal codes in a locality
endpoint.request: Query: settlement — locality name, region — region, district — district.

endpoint.name: Finalize order (replace UUID with Tracking Number)
Get available timeslots
endpoint.request: Query: postIndexFrom, postIndexTo, contractNumber, plannedShippingDate, address, workTypeCode, mailTypeCode, mailCtgCode.

endpoint.name: Cancel booking
endpoint.request: Path parameter: uuidOrBarcode — booking UUID or Tracking Number

group.name: Utilities
group.description: Data normalization, tariff calculation, API limits

json_examples.example: [ { "address-type": "DEFAULT", "area": null, "building": null, "corpus": null, "hotel": null, "house": "1", "id": "adr-1", "index": "125009", "letter": null, "location": null, "num-address-type": null, "original-address": "Москва, Тверская 1", "place": "Москва", "quality-code": "GOOD", "region": "Москва", "room": null, "slash": null, "street": "Тверская", "validation-code": "VALIDATED" } ]

endpoint.name: Phone normalization
endpoint.request: Array of objects [{area, id, original-phone, place, region}]

group.name: Reference Data
group.note: Country and currency reference data are static lists loaded separately. They are used in the mail-direct field (country code) and currency field (currency code) when working with international shipments.

responses.response: Object with account settings: addresses, shipping points, contact details
Array of extended order objects with all tariff fields

endpoint.name: Export Post Office passport data
endpoint.request: Query parameter: type — export type. Accept: application/octet-stream.

responses.response: ZIP file with Post Office passport data

json_examples.example: Ответ возвращается в виде ZIP-архива (binary). Accept: application/octet-stream.

error.description: All orders have already been sent
Invalid batch status for this operation
Order is already in a batch
No access rights to the order
Delivery between the specified postal codes is not available
Unauthorized — missing or invalid authorization headers
Forbidden — no permission for this action

business-rules.rule: Workflow sequence: create orders -> create batch -> checkin (submit Form F103) -> retrieve documents.
The checkin operation submits electronic Form F103 documents to the post office. After checkin, the batch transitions to FROZEN status and becomes unavailable for editing.
All API requests must be made over HTTPS. HTTP requests are not accepted.
Two authorization headers are required simultaneously: Authorization (application token) and X-User-Authorization (user key). Absence of either results in a 401 error.
When creating a batch, if orders have different types or categories, the system automatically creates multiple batches, grouping orders by type and category.
Moving orders from a batch back to "New" status is only possible if the batch is in CREATED status.
Each order moved to a batch is automatically assigned a Tracking Number (barcode).

An address is considered valid only when both conditions are met: quality-code must be GOOD, POSTAL_BOX, ON_DEMAND, or UNDEF_05, AND validation-code must be VALIDATED, OVERRIDDEN, or CONFIRMED_MANUALLY.

rule.description: Form F112EK only for Cash on Delivery

business-rules.rule: Form F112EK is generated only for orders with Cash on Delivery (COD) (field payment > 0).
Do not store API passwords in plain text files. Use a secure secrets storage solution.
The id parameter in normalization requests is used to match requests with responses. The order of elements in the response is not guaranteed to match the order in the request.
In the current TSS implementation, the workTypeCode parameter accepts only the value "delivery".
For TSS timeslot booking, mailTypeCode=24 (Courier Online) is used.
Delivery costs and all tariff data are returned in kopecks (1 ruble = 100 kopecks).
Weight is specified in grams, dimensions in centimeters, envelope and label sizes in millimeters.

Normalization methods (clean/address, clean/phone, clean/physical) are batch methods. Pass a JSON array even for a single element. A single object will return an error. usecases-chrome-backlog.md, usecases-soapui-clean_address.md
Error position numbering (the position field in responses) starts from zero. The first element in the array has position=0. usecases-chrome-backlog.md

json-examples-summary.note: All JSON examples are placed in CDATA blocks within the corresponding endpoints (section 5). Below is the index.

ref.description: Create order v2 — request/response (orders[] with barcodes)

unit.name: Weight
unit.description: Shipment weight is specified in grams

unit.name: Cost
unit.description: All costs and tariffs are specified in kopecks (1 ruble = 100 kopecks)

unit.name: Dimensions (dimension)
unit.description: Fields height, length, width of the dimension object are in centimeters

unit.name: Standard sizes (envelopes)
unit.description: Envelope and label sizes are specified in millimeters

dictionary.name: Countries
dictionary.description: Countries dictionary, code = ISO 3166-1 for international shipments (mail-direct)

dictionary.name: Currencies
dictionary.description: Currencies dictionary, code=ISO 4217 for customs declarations
